meta.purpose: Full system handoff for Grok — what was built this session, how everything works, what Grok must do differently going forward

session_11_summary.headline: RALPH went from theater to mechanical. LoRA training completed. surajstoic purged. Brain auto-sync installed.
completed_tasks: P0-07 — Train Jasmine FLUX.1-dev LoRA — COMPLETE (jasmine_v1.safetensors, 164MB, 2000 steps)
RALPH v16.1-jasmine — all 4 mechanical components live
surajstoic account — all references purged from Instagram project
Grok brain — PostToolUse auto-sync hook installed (updates after every task, not just session end)

how_it_works.step_1: Claude commits files to dev branch via studio-sync auto-commit hook (~/.studio-sync/sync-project.sh)
how_it_works.step_2: auto-merge-dev.yml detects push to dev, creates PR dev→main if none exists
how_it_works.step_3: ralph-gate-enforcer.yml runs CI checks on the PR
how_it_works.step_4_pass: auto-merge-dev.yml merges PR automatically — CEO does nothing
how_it_works.step_4_fail: PR blocked until missing gate files are added

branch_protection.type: GitHub Ruleset (NOT classic branch protection — 404s on this repo)
branch_protection.requires: enforce-ralph job must pass before any merge
branch_protection.note: Direct push to main returns 403. Confirmed working.

GATE_G0_COMPLETE.md.written_by: Grok provides content → Claude commits the file

GATE_G2_COMPLETE.md.written_by: Claude after reviewing Grok's G0 output

checks: Extracts TASK ID from changed files (git diff origin/main...HEAD)
If task folder changed: verifies GATE_G0_COMPLETE.md exists
If task folder changed: verifies GATE_G2_COMPLETE.md exists
If task folder changed: verifies GATE_G3_COMPLETE.md exists
Always: verifies GROK_BRAIN_SUMMARY.md was updated in this PR (blocks if stale)
gate_enforcer.skip_condition: Non-task PRs (infra, docs, config) bypass gate checks by design

triggers: push to dev — creates PR dev→main
check_run completed — merges if enforce-ralph passed
workflow_run completed — merges if enforce-ralph passed
schedule every 15 minutes — safety net poll
auto_merge.note: CEO never needs to touch GitHub. Push to dev → auto-merged to main within ~2 minutes.

grok_brain_sync.mechanism: PostToolUse hook fires after every Write or Edit tool call
grok_brain_sync.triggers_when: Modified file matches: GATE_G*_COMPLETE, rolling_task_document, jasmine_mako_task_table, or 00_agency/tasks/*
what_it_updates: LoRA status (reads actual .safetensors file on disk)
grok_brain_sync.then: Commits GROK_BRAIN_SUMMARY.md and pushes to current branch immediately
grok_brain_sync.fallback: Stop hook at session end runs full update regardless

branches.main: Protected. RALPH enforced. Never push directly.
branches.dev: All auto-commits land here. PRs auto-created to main.

github_setup.purged_account: surajstoic — removed from all project files. That account holds sensitive financial data. Never reference it here.
github_setup.auto_commit_hook: ~/.studio-sync/sync-project.sh — watches file changes, commits to current branch, pushes as rheavoss

grok_workflow_going_forward.step_1_always: Read 99_grok_brain/GROK_BRAIN_SUMMARY.md from GitHub (main branch) before any task
grok_workflow_going_forward.step_2_g0: Do live research: Google + site:reddit.com + X search for the task
grok_workflow_going_forward.step_3_deliver: Paste your G0 research findings in chat. Claude will write the GATE_G0_COMPLETE.md file and commit it.
grok_workflow_going_forward.step_4_wait: Claude writes G2. CEO approves (G3). Auto-merge fires. Done.
grok_workflow_going_forward.important: Grok cannot write files or run code directly. Grok does research → pastes content → Claude commits the gate files.
grok_workflow_going_forward.brain_is_always_fresh: As of Session 11, brain updates after every task automatically. No more stale state.

P0-08.note: Verify India pricing at higgsfield.ai — do NOT use USD × rate

P0-18.task: Build ExifTool strip + film grain pipeline

P0-29.status: Pending — needs G0 research from Grok

P0-32.task: Test Higgsfield as primary video platform

locked_decisions.content_ceiling: Option A — Lena Paul level. No nudity. No topless. Ever. CEO personal values. Non-negotiable.
locked_decisions.currency: All costs and revenue in INR. USD × ₹93.08. Always verify India pricing directly.
locked_decisions.character: Jasmine only. Single character. No others.
locked_decisions.revenue_platforms: Fanvue + Passes + X/Twitter all live Day 1
